/usr/bin/c++  -rdynamic -O0 -ggdb -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-unused-function -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -Wno-deprecated-declarations CMakeFiles/test_config.dir/test/test_config.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_config  -Wl,-rpath,/home/d/sylar/cmake libsylar.so -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
